zh.lifeSummary: 當Almodis de la Marche於1062年出生在法國阿奎泰吉洛德拉 馬時，她的父親Audebert II de la Marche42歲，母親Ponce Lusignan28歲。她於大約1083年與Roger le Poitevin在法國波特芝士結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1116年11月17日在她的家鄉享年54歲，埋葬在西班牙卡塔倫亞巴薩隆拿。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Almodis de la Marche于1062年出生在法国阿奎泰吉洛德拉 馬时，她的父亲Audebert II de la Marche42岁，母亲Ponce Lusignan28岁。她于大约1083年与Roger le Poitevin在法国波特芝士结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于1116年11月17日在她的家乡享年54岁，埋葬在西班牙卡塔倫亞巴薩隆拿。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: la
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Vietnamese Hung, Cuong, Anh, Thanh, Ha, Hoang, Tuan, Chau, Hao, Hien, Hoa, Hue, Nam, Phong, Sinh, Tuong, Min, Tam, Tanh, Thai, Tham, Tinh, Yeong.  Chinese Hong, Hang, Sang, Tong, Chan, Chi, Hwa Ja, Hyung, Kam, Ki Bong, Kin, Man.
Vietnamese: from the Chinese surname 羅, see   Luo   1.
Vietnamese (Lã): from the Chinese surname 呂, see Lu 6 and 3 below.

variants.name: Luo
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Wei, Jian, Yi, Ping, Yong, Zhen, Feng, Hong, Ming, Jin, Bin, Chen, Hai, Lan, Min, Huan, Hung, Shen, Tian.

Mandarin form of the surname 羅, meaning ‘net for catching birds’ or ‘to collect’ in Chinese: (i) from Luo (羅), the name of an ancient state (located in present-day Hubei province). After it was annexed by the state of Chu during the early Spring and Autumn period (770–476  BC ), people from the state migrated southwards and adopted Luo (羅) as their surname. (ii) from the Po Duo Luo (破多羅) and Chi Luo (叱羅) families from the Xianbei ethnic group in northern China, who changed their original surnames to 羅 during the Northern Wei dynasty (386–534  AD ). (iii) from the personal name Hu Se Luo (斛瑟羅), leader of an ancient Turkic tribe who are believed to have migrated to China during the Tang dynasty (618–907  AD ). His descendants inherited his name Hu Se Luo (斛瑟羅) as their surname and shortened it to 羅 during the Northern Wei dynasty (386–534  AD ). (iv) from the name of one of the seven families from the Bandun Man, an ethnic group residing in ancient southwestern China (located mainly in present-day Sichuan province).

nameMeanings.name: Marche
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: March
meanings: English: habitational name from March (Cambridgeshire) or from any of numerous minor English placenames deriving from Middle English marche ‘boundary’ (partly from Old English mearc in the dative-case form mearce, partly from Old French marche). Compare Mark 2.
Catalan: from the personal name March, Catalan equivalent of Mark 1. This surname is also found in southern France.
German: topographic name from Middle Low German march, Middle High German marc(h) ‘mark, sign, boundary’, or a habitational name from a place called with this word (Bavaria).

en.lifeSummary: When Almodis de la Marche was born in 1062, in La Marche, Gironde, Aquitaine, France, her father, Audebert II de la Marche, was 42 and her mother, Ponce Lusignan, was 28. She married Roger le Poitevin about 1083, in Poitou, France. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 3 daughters. She died on 17 November 1116, in her hometown, at the age of 54, and was buried in Barcelona, Catalonia, Spain.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Almodis de la Marche est née en 1062, à La Marche, Gironde, Aquitaine, France, son père, Audebert II de la Marche, avait 42 ans et sa mère, Ponce Lusignan, avait 28 ans. Elle a épousé Roger le Poitevin environ 1083, à Poitou, France. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée le 17 novembre 1116, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 54 ans, et a été enterrée à Barcelona, Catalunya, Espagne.

de.lifeSummary: Als Almodis de la Marche 1062 in La Marche, Gironde, Aquitaine, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Audebert II de la Marche 42 und ihre Mutter Ponce Lusignan 28. Sie hat um 1083 in Poitou, Frankreich Roger le Poitevin geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb am 17. November 1116 im Alter von 54 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort und wurde in Barcelona, Catalunya, Spanien begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Almodis de la Marche è nata il nel 1062 nel La Marche, Gironde, Aquitaine, Francia, sua padre, Audebert II de la Marche, aveva 42 anni e sua madre, Ponce Lusignan, aveva 28 anni. Lei sposato Roger le Poitevin circa 1083, nel Poitou, Francia. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 3 figlie. Morì il 17 novembre 1116, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 54 anni, e fu sepolta a Barcelona, Catalunya, Spagna.

ja.lifeSummary: Almodis de la Marcheが1062年にフランスアクイティアインギロンドラ マルチェで生まれた時，父Audebert II de la Marcheは42歳，母Ponce Lusignanは28歳であった。約1083年にフランスポイトウでRoger le Poitevinと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1116年11月17日に故郷で54歳で死去し，スペインカタルニーアバーセロナにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Almodis de la Marche(이)가 1062년 프랑스 아키테인 지론드 라 마체에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Audebert II de la Marche(은)는 42세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Ponce Lusignan(은)는 28세였다. 그녀는 대략 1083년 프랑스 포이토우에서 Roger le Poitevin(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1116년 11월 17일 그녀의 고향에서 54세의 나이로 사망했으며 스페인 카털니아 바셀나에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Almodis de la Marche nasceu em 1062, em La Marche, Gironde, Aquitaine, França, seu pai, Audebert II de la Marche, tinha 42 anos e sua mãe, Ponce Lusignan, tinha 28 anos. Ela casou-se com Roger le Poitevin aproximadamente 1083, em Poitou, França. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu em 17 de novembro de 1116, em sua cidade natal, com 54 anos, e foi sepultada em Barcelona, Catalunya, Espanha.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Almodis de la Marche родилась в 1062 г. в местности ла марч, гиронд, аквитеин, Франция, её отцу по имени Audebert II de la Marche было 42 года, а матери, которую звали Ponce Lusignan, 28. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Roger le Poitevin около 1083 г. в местности поитоу, Франция. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 3 дочери. Она умерла 17 ноября 1116 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 54 лет и была похоронена в местности барселона, каталуня, Испания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Almodis de la Marche nació en 1062, en La Marche, Gironde, Aquitaine, Francia, su papá, Audebert II de la Marche, tenía 42 años y su mamá, Ponce Lusignan, tenía 28 años. Se casó con Roger le Poitevin aproximadamente 1083, en Poitou, Francia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió el 17 de noviembre de 1116, en su pueblo, a la edad de 54 años, y fue sepultada en Barcelona, Cataluña, España.
